reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_25]]
Speaker 1: Of course.

[[BLOCK:srt_26]]
Speaker 1: Golden Gate University continually refines its curriculum around students’ real-world needs, ensuring they receive a practical, career-focused education grounded in reality.

[[BLOCK:srt_27]]
Speaker 1: Most of our faculty come directly from industry and bring extensive hands-on experience to the classroom.

[[BLOCK:srt_28]]
Speaker 1: They remain active at the forefront of their respective fields, teaching what they are actively practicing and connecting students with industry resources in San Francisco and around the world.

[[BLOCK:srt_29]]
Speaker 1: In short, our model brings together seasoned professionals who both practice and teach, equipping students with the most current and relevant knowledge available.

[[BLOCK:srt_30]]
Speaker 2: I would add that a defining feature of our education is the mindset we cultivate: achieving business success while creating value for society. We want students not only to use their skills to advance their own careers, but also to make a positive impact on the communities they serve.

[[BLOCK:srt_31]]
Speaker 3: I see. In your view, compared with other American universities—especially in terms of career orientation and connections with industry in the Bay Area (Bay Area)—what is Golden Gate University’s greatest advantage?

[[BLOCK:srt_32]]
Speaker 1: We’ve touched on some of this already. What truly sets us apart is that we design our programs around students’ immediate needs and deliver them in flexible formats that fit seamlessly into their lives. At the same time, we connect students directly with industry leaders—who may be their instructors—or through internships and the extensive professional resources available across the Bay Area.

[[BLOCK:srt_33]]
Speaker 2: As the president mentioned, many of our faculty are working professionals.

[[BLOCK:srt_34]]
Speaker 2: They bring the latest insights from their day-to-day work straight into the classroom.

[[BLOCK:srt_35]]
Speaker 2: That’s especially critical in fields like artificial intelligence (人工智能), which evolves almost month by month.

[[BLOCK:srt_36]]
Speaker 2: That’s why our curriculum must be continuously updated to keep pace with industry developments.
